title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:42297:run:20260402T093918:54970 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: `install-kernel-launchers.sh` の現状フローは次です。 - コアの skill 起動フローは、`skill` ラッパーが `orchestrator-entrypoint-hint` を経由して `codex-skill-launch` を実行し（`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/skill`）、`codex-skill-launch` が SKILL を解決して `codex exec` 向けの prompt を組み立てて実行します（[launchers/skill](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/skill:1), [launchers/codex-skill-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch:51), [launchers/codex-skill-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch:107)）。 - `install-kernel-launchers.sh` はインストール時に `installed_skill_names` を収集し、`enumerate_skill_specs` で - `~/.codex/skills` 配下 - `~/.codex/plugins/cache/**/skills/*/SKILL.md` 配下 を走査して `skill_name`（プラグインスキルは `plugin:skill`）を列挙します（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L246), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L267)）。 - 各 skill について `render_skill_prompt` が `SKILL.md` を読み込み、固定テンプレに `<!-- codex-managed-skill-prompt:... -->` を付けた prompt を生成し、`install_skill_prompt` で `~/.codex/prompts/<skill>.md` に書きます。既存で marker がないファイルは上書きしません（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L452), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L457), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L337)）。 `--check` が比較している対象は以下です。 - コア launcher 自体: `kernel/k4/vote/v/skill/codex-skill-launch` の `cmp` と、`prepare_helper_sources` 経由で `codex-prompt-launch` / `orchestrator-entrypoint-hint` の `cmp`（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L180), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L204), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L141), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L507)）。 - コア slash prompt `/kernel /k /vote /v` は `print_prompt_check_status` の `prompt_matches`（`~/.codex/prompts/{kernel,k,vote,v}.md` を source と比較）だけ（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L233), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L467), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L475)）。 - スキル slash prompt は `print_skill_prompt_check_status` → `skill_prompt_matches` で、`render_skill_prompt` した一時ファイルと実ファイルを `cmp`（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L372), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L386), [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L486))。 **最小変更案（core slash を崩さない）** `--check` の `skill prompts` 判定を「管理対象だけ」と一致する形に寄せる。具体的には `print_skill_prompt_check_status` を、現状と同じルールで「marker が無い既存ファイルは `skip` 扱い」にして判定対象から除外する（インストール側も既に marker 未付は `install_skill_prompt` で skip しているため）。 これで core の `/kernel /k /vote /v` 系は影響せず、未管理の custom skill prompt がいる環境でも `skill prompts: drift` の不要な失敗を防げます（`skill` 系は `skipped` の設計意図に揃う）。 変更候補位置は `print_skill_prompt_check_status` / `skill_prompt_matches` あたり（[install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L386), [install-kernel-lau...
